videos.headline: Texas A&M Aggies vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights
videos.description: Texas A&M Aggies vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M Aggies vs. Texas Longhorns: Full Highlights) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Texas spoils Texas A&M's undefeated season in Lone Star Showdown
videos.description: Quintrevion Wisner runs for 155 yards on the ground as the No. 16 Longhorns' defense rallies and causes two interceptions to snap the No. 3 Aggies undefeated record, 27-17.

videos.headline: Marcel Reed leaves game in 1st quarter with apparent leg injury
videos.description: Texas A&M quarterback Marcel Reed exits the game in the first quarter after suffering an apparent leg injury.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marcel Reed leaves game in 1st quarter with apparent leg injury ) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Steve Sarkisian makes his case for Texas to CFP committee after Texas A&M
videos.description: Sarkisian explains what statement the win over their rival No. 3 Aggies means, describing the No. 16 Longhorns' resume and why they should get a bid.
